zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Cobham於大約1410年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham29歲，母親Eleanor Culpeper29歲。她於1428年6月10日與Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester在英國英格蘭素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1452年7月7日在威爾士安格萊波奧馬利斯享年43歲，埋葬在威爾士安格萊波奧馬利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Cobham于大约1410年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham29岁，母亲Eleanor Culpeper29岁。她于1428年6月10日与Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester在英国英格兰素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1452年7月7日在威尔士安格萊波奧馬利斯享年43岁，埋葬在威尔士安格萊波奧馬利斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Cobham was born about 1410, in Kent, England, her father, Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham, was 29 and her mother, Eleanor Culpeper, was 29. She married Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester on 10 June 1428, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 7 July 1452, in Beaumaris, Anglesey, Wales, at the age of 43, and was buried in Beaumaris, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Cobham est née environ 1410, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Culpeper, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester le 10 juin 1428, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1452, à Beaux Marais, Anglesey, Galles, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaux Marais, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Cobham um 1410 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham 29 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Culpeper 29. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1428 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Juli 1452 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Beaumaris, Anglesey, Wales und wurde in Beaumaris, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Cobham è nata il circa 1410 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Culpeper, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester il 10 giugno 1428, nel Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 luglio 1452, nel Beaumaris, Anglesey, Galles, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Beaumaris, Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Cobhamが約1410年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobhamは29歳，母Eleanor Culpeperは29歳であった。1428年6月10日にイギリスイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルでHumphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1452年7月7日にウェールズアングレセイビーウマリスで43歳で死去し，ウェールズアングレセイビーウマリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Cobham(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Culpeper(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1428년 6월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스터버루그h 카스틀에서 Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 7월 7일 웨일스 앤글레시 보마이스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 앤글레시 보마이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Culpeper, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester em 10 de junho de 1428, em Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de julho de 1452, em Beaumaris, Anglesey, Gales, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaumaris, Anglesey, Gales.

ru.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Cobham родилась около 1410 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Culpeper, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester 10 июня 1428 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 июля 1452 г. в местности бомарис, англеси, Уэльс в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности бомарис, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Cobham nació aproximadamente 1410, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor Culpeper, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester el 10 de junio de 1428, en Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de julio de 1452, en Beaumaris, Isla Oscura, Gales, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Beaumaris, Isla Oscura, Gales.
